name: Cedar Realty Trust Inc. 6.50% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Cedar Realty Trust Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the ownership, operation, and redevelopment of grocery-anchored shopping centers in high-density urban markets. The company's portfolio consists primarily of properties located in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic regions of the United States. Cedar Realty Trust is headquartered in Port Washington, New York.
